ValidationRule.description: For loan type= 'fixed', 'Fixed Interest rate' cannot be null
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Loan_Type__c, 'Fixed') , OR ( ISBLANK( leaseworks__Fixed_Interest_Rate__c ), ISNULL( leaseworks__Fixed_Interest_Rate__c ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please select the Fixed Interest Rate. This is required for Fixed loan type.
